banned_channels.name: China Travel
banned_channels.reason: Explicit ToS §14: no robots/scrapers without written permission. §2: content for personal noncommercial use only, no copying or derivative works.

banned_channels.name: DroneTV
banned_channels.reason: Explicit ToS: 'You shall not copy, reproduce, distribute, transmit, broadcast, display, sell, license, or otherwise exploit any Content without prior written consent.' Automated systems also banned.

banned_channels.name: Pluto TV Animaux
banned_channels.reason: Paramount-owned streaming platform. ToS prohibits recording and redistribution.

banned_channels.name: Pluto TV Histoire
banned_channels.reason: Paramount-owned streaming platform. ToS prohibits recording and redistribution.

banned_channels.name: Voyages & Saveurs
banned_channels.reason: Paramount-owned streaming platform. ToS prohibits recording and redistribution.

banned_channels.name: Go USA TV
banned_channels.reason: Distributed via Samsung WURL platform. Platform-level terms likely cover recording restrictions; no direct viewer ToS found but corporate distribution chain creates unclear liability.

banned_channels.name: InTravel
banned_channels.reason: Distributed via Rakuten platform. No channel-specific ToS but Rakuten platform terms apply; corporate distribution chain creates unclear liability.

banned_channels.name: GoTraveler
banned_channels.reason: Geo-blocked from this region. Commercial distribution via Amagi platform.

banned_channels.name: Fun Roads TV
banned_channels.reason: ToS page linked on site but inaccessible (404). Copyright claimed by Fun Roads Media Inc. Terms unknown.

banned_channels.name: Go2Travel
banned_channels.reason: Website returned 402 Payment Required; unable to verify terms of use.

banned_channels.name: Travelxp (all feeds: HD, 4K HDR)
banned_channels.reason: Geo-blocked in all available feeds. Privacy policy only covers data, not content terms. Base ID covers both HD and 4K HDR variants.
